ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "top_genre" TEXT /* Top genre associated with the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album's cover art */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the track in milliseconds */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_genres" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who listened to the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track that was listened to */,
  "listen_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was listened to */,
  "listen_time" TEXT /* Time when the track was listened to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_history_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., danceability, energy) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the analytics belong to */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the track */,
  "listen_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been listened to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)
